title: Random Stuff
description: Random stuff, for example, a puma.
body:
Some Random Stuff. This mod adds:
- a Cougar
- an entity eraser
- an entity creator
- a plague
- a new dimension
- a syringe
and some more insignificant features.

Cougar:
  The Cougar is spawning in every forest and will try to kill every other cougar nearby. It's friendly to players until they hit them. Things you could do when you hit it: run

Ereaser:
  when you hit an entity with the ereaser, it will disappear and drop a probe.
Creator:
  right click in the air with the creator and a gui will open!
  ![Gui from the creator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b978c9e9c4400333a30d9c9160c39f6bc80aca2.png)
 When you now type in the id of an entity and press "spawn", it will take one probe from your inventory and spawn the entity you typed in.
 for example:
   "minecraft:bee" #bee
   "minecraft:warden" #warden
   "structures:cougar" #cougar(from this mod)
Plague:
  in the world is a new biome where big flowers can spawn![A big Flower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/489c97e5153a656cf0cad7804eb8736f82afa0ff.png)
With the stuff from there(the parts from the flowers and also the little flowers) you can craft the eraser, the creator, and the portal to the new dimension!
![The different blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53248a501c6b79ce53b0339f787d1422b993f9c.png)
The dimension:
  you can enter the dimension by placing reinforced element blocks in a shape of a netherportal and light it with a Holydimension Portal Igniter. In the dimension there is only the new biome.
syringe:
  you can fill it up witch vaccacine and the throw it witch a syringe slingshot. when you hit an entity, an empty syringe will be dropped an all effects of the entity will be removed.


I recommend to play with just enough items because there are to much recipes to show them here.
Download this mod when you think minecraft is to boring without mods.
